creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jkois
Date: Wed Jun 27 20:47:00 2012
New Revision: 39136
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39136

Log:
  PR:     www/166944
  
  Add PsychsoftPC to the list of hardware vendors with FreeBSD support.
  
  Requested by:   Tim Lynch (sales att psychsoftpc dott com)

Modified:
  head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml

Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml
==============================================================================
--- head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml	Wed Jun 27 20:25:28 2012	(r39135)
+++ head/share/sgml/commercial.hardware.xml	Wed Jun 27 20:47:00 2012	(r39136)
@@ -536,6 +536,16 @@
     </description>
   </entry>
 
+  <entry id="psychsoftpc">
+    <name>Psychsoftpc</name>
+    <url>http://www.psychsoftpc.com/</url>
+    <description>
+      Psychsoftpc is a manufacturer of high performance computers,
+      workstations and clusters with Linux or FreeBSD preinstalled upon
+      request.
+    </description>
+  </entry>
+
   <entry id="RandDAssociates">
     <name>R and D Associates, Inc.</name>
     <url>http://www.RnDAssociates.com/</url>
